changes.description: Meowtator Discord bot signup sheet display
changes.details: Fixed leader displayed twice in signup sheets by excluding leader status from role column filters, and fixed raid train duplicate user display by using userId_role deduplication key instead of just userId.
Added requester Discord ID tracking for signup sheets created from the app, with automatic DM notifications when sheets are published and automatic request status updates to 'closed'.

Replaced item level-based sorting with explicit sortOrder field for consistent raid progression display across Settings/Tracking, Settings/Raids, ToDo, and Dashboard. Cathedral now correctly appears as the newest raid at the bottom.
